name: subagent findings format validator allows the rule_id field to be absent on a non-rule finding
command: printf '[{"severity":"P2","file":"x.js","line":10,"finding":"general note","suggested_fix":"y"}]\n' > findings.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-findings.sh" --findings findings.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
